'''dhanovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:seaboot|seaboot]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:seaboot|seaboot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhanovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæneveth|dhæneveth]] || [[word:dhænevej|dhænevej]] || [[word:dhænevesh|dhænevesh]] || [[word:dhæneve|dhæneve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhanonovoth|dhanonovoth]] || [[word:dhanonovoj|dhanonovoj]] || [[word:dhanonovosh|dhanonovosh]] || [[word:dhanonovo|dhanonovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhanovoth|dhanovoth]] || [[word:dhanovoj|dhanovoj]] || [[word:dhanovosh|dhanovosh]] || [[word:dhanovo|dhanovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhanofvoth|dhanofvoth]] || [[word:dhanofvoj|dhanofvoj]] || [[word:dhanofvosh|dhanofvosh]] || [[word:dhanofvof|dhanofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhanovotho|dhanovotho]] || [[word:dhanovojo|dhanovojo]] || [[word:dhanovosho|dhanovosho]] || [[word:dhanovoko|dhanovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhanovoth|dhanovoth]] || [[word:dhanovoj|dhanovoj]] || [[word:dhanovosh|dhanovosh]] || [[word:dhanovo|dhanovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhanovothol|dhanovothol]] || [[word:dhanovojol|dhanovojol]] || [[word:dhanovoshol|dhanovoshol]] || [[word:dhanovokol|dhanovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhanovothotho|dhanovothotho]] || [[word:dhanovojojo|dhanovojojo]] || [[word:dhanovoshosho|dhanovoshosho]] || [[word:dhanovoko|dhanovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhanovothon|dhanovothon]] || [[word:dhanovojon|dhanovojon]] || [[word:dhanovoshon|dhanovoshon]] || [[word:dhanovokon|dhanovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhanovothoro|dhanovothoro]] || [[word:dhanovojoro|dhanovojoro]] || [[word:dhanovoshoro|dhanovoshoro]] || [[word:dhanovokoro|dhanovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
